title: An improved method for measuring metaldehyde in surface water using liquid chromatography tandem mass spectrometry
author: Schumacher, Castle, et al.

steps.title: Sample preparation
steps.instruction: Dilute stock metaldehyde solution (50 μg/L) in ultrapure water to obtain working calibration standard solutions of concentration 0, 10, 50, 100, 300, 500, 750 and 1000 ng/L

steps.title: Sample preparation
steps.instruction: Attach an Oasis HLB cartridge to the 12 port/6-position selection valve.

steps.title: Sample preparation
steps.instruction: Add 1 mL of sample and working calibration standard solutions into labelled silanized auto-sampler vials. Add 20 μL of internal standard solution (50 μg/L) to each vial and mix. Transfer to auto-sampler tray.

steps.title: Sample preparation
steps.instruction: Load method which contains the entire LC conditions and switching valve programme, as shown in Table 3, via the Mass Hunter data acquisition software.

steps.title: Sample preparation
steps.instruction: Allow system to stabilise for 30 min prior to commencing analysis. Ensure that the on-line enrichment and HPLC system is leak free.

steps.title: Sample preparation
steps.instruction: Analyse samples and calibration standards solutions and prepare a calibration Table via the Mass Hunter data analysis software.
